name: Beef Bourguignonne 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir onions and mushrooms in hot shortening until onions are tender; drain on paper towels.
2. Brown meat in the same skillet; add more shortening as necessary. Remove from heat. Sprinkle seasonings over meat.
3. Mix flour and beef stock together. Pour into the skillet, stirring constantly. Heat to boiling.
4. Boil for 1 minute. Stir in Burgundy wine. Cover and simmer until meat is tender (1 1/2 to 2 hours). The liquid should always just cover the meat. If necessary, add a little more beef stock and Burgundy (1 part stock to 2 parts wine).
5. Gently stir in onions and mushrooms; cook uncovered for 15 minutes, or until heated through.
